identity.name: FMS
identity.persona: The Architect's Console - A tool that feels like a physical instrument.

rules: Headings must use Manrope for a technical, precise feel.
Use 'tracking-tight' on all headings larger than 24px.
Dashboard metrics (numbers) should use 'font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums' to align perfectly.

containers.dashboard_card: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.stat_card: p-6 flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2 bg-card rounded-xl border shadow-sm
cards.chart_card: p-6 pt-0 bg-card rounded-xl border shadow-sm col-span-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.status_pill: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-to-background contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-primary focus state.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Sidebar Layout' using a fixed sidebar on desktop and a Sheet component on mobile.
Use 'Recharts' for all charts (Bar, Pie, Line) inside Shadcn Cards.
For the 'Work Orders' table, use the 'TanStack Table' (React Table) implementation with sorting and pagination.
Ensure the 'Dark Mode' toggle works by applying the 'dark' class to the html/body element.
All forms (Login, Create Work Order) must use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for validation.
Do NOT use gradients for text. Keep it legible.
When displaying dates, use 'date-fns' for formatting (e.g., 'PPP').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
